case_title: MISSION LANGUAGE AND VOCATIONAL SCHOOL, INC. vs. UHTENWOLDT, RICHARD et al

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES FILED BY DEFENDANT UHTENWOLDT, RICHARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT UHTENWOLDT, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3116 SIXTEENTH STREET #22, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA $1,366.94 RENT, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,446.94, STAYED UNTIL SEP-20-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTFF WAIVES BACK RENTS/DAMAGES & COSTS IF DFT VACATES BY 5PM ON 9-20-94. EACH SIDE BEAR OWN COSTS/ATNY FEES AS LONG AS STIPULATION COMPLIED WITH. IF DFT DOES NOT VACATE, WRIT WILL BE EXECUTED WITH NO FURTHER STAYS.

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MISSION LANGUAGE AND VOCATIONAL SCHOOL, INC. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-13-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 03 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-20-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
